description.ko: 자연스러운 유체 역학을 정교하게 탐구하며, 유기적인 풍경 속에서 빛과 형태의 매끄러운 전이를 포착합니다.
description.en: A sophisticated exploration of natural fluid dynamics, capturing the seamless transition of light and form in a bio-morphic landscape.

prompt: Abstract organic flow with fluid, bioluminescent curves, soft iridescent gradients, macro view of liquid silk transitions, biological textures, elegant movement, ethereal lighting, 8k resolution, minimalist composition, cinematic rendering.
